meta.title: Brew Finder - Find Homebrew packages from the websites you visit
meta.description: Brew Finder is a privacy-first Chrome extension that detects matching Homebrew formulae and casks while you browse.

hero.title: Brew Finder
hero.subtitle: Discover the packages you need more easily
hero.demoNote: This software can be installed with Homebrew:

features.title: Automatic Detection
features.body: Brew Finder checks relevant websites and helps you quickly discover installable Homebrew packages.

features.title: Package Info & One-Click Copy
features.body: See package details and copy the install commands for formula and cask packages.

features.title: Large-Site Friendly
features.body: Designed for domains like Google.com with many related packages, helping discovery while minimizing interruption.

features.title: GitHub Matching
features.body: Visiting github.com/user/repo can identify the corresponding Homebrew package.

privacy.title: Absolute Privacy & Security
privacy.body: No network access. Package data is bundled locally and never leaves your device.

footer.tagline: Discover the packages you need more easily
